visual_description: A man in a dark suit stands facing right, partially obscured by another man in a dark shirt walking away; two other men stand behind them, partially visible. A close-up shows a silver Motorola phone displaying a text message with the number "454870" and options for deletion or confirmation. The scene is dimly lit with greenish tones, suggesting an indoor or nighttime setting.
